data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All ACs verified: (1) 8/8 EAGAIN tests pass, (2) _is_eagain_failure found, (3) EAGAIN_PATTERN found, (4) resource_exhaustion in hierarchy, (5) deference test passes (PASSED:8 confirms it — AC5 grep pattern in ticket cannot match because assert.sh only prints FAIL lines, not PASS lines; behavior is correct), (6) part1 regression 13/13 pass, (7) syntax clean
